statement: In every magma, Equation 2587 (`x = (y * ((z * y) * x)) * w`) implies Equation 1135 (`x = y * ((y * (z * y)) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0445
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z y) x)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op y (op z y)) z))
